scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,media -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir apps/web dev" "pnpm --dir apps/media dev"
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm build && pnpm --dir apps/web exec wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir apps/media typecheck && pnpm --dir apps/web exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.check: pnpm catalog:build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm --dir apps/web lint && pnpm --dir apps/web build && node --test tools/tests/*.test.mjs apps/web/tests/*.test.mjs
